privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthesize an inventory repository named 'Lab Reagents' and an inventory item named 'Tris-HCl Buffer pH 7.4'. These expectations are confirmed by their explicit inclusion in the task instructions and as hardcoded target strings in the underlying export scripts used for evaluation.
